episodes.name: The Selfie Scammer
episodes.overview: In Nashville, Cecilie and Brianne help newly single Jill, who lent her life's savings to a charismatic wellness guru who took her money and vanished.

episodes.name: Fallen Soldier
episodes.overview: A secret recording blows Jill's case wide open. Cecilie and Brianne aid a woman whose army veteran boyfriend defrauded her out of nearly $50,000.

episodes.name: A Fraudster in the Family
episodes.overview: Cecilie and Brianne help a Florida woman facing a $2M debt and embroiled in a dangerous web of deceit after her husband's true identity is revealed.

episodes.name: Geek Girl Con
episodes.overview: Cecilie and Brianne assist Shareza's daughters in confronting Dorian. Later, they accept a rare appeal for help from a man taken in by a romance scam.

episodes.name: Major League Scammer
episodes.overview: Brianne asks the FBI about reopening Aaron's case. Then, she and Cecilie race to stop a former athlete hoping to score big on a woman's money.

episodes.name: Fraud Fighters
episodes.overview: Cecilie learns that Lindsay isn't Chris' only victim, and a harrowing chase begins when Brianne uncovers the truth about the fraudster's credentials.
